headline: Morgan Stanley Keeps Equal Weight Rating on EOG Resources (EOG)
summary: EOG Resources, Inc. (NYSE:EOG) is one of the 10 Most Undervalued American Stocks to Invest In. On June 29, 2026, Morgan Stanley analyst Devin McDermott lowered the firm’s price target on EOG Resources, Inc. (NYSE:EOG) to $156 from $160 and kept an Equal Weight rating. McDermott noted that oil prices have declined since the U.S. […]

headline: Truist Securities Maintains Hold on EOG Resources, Lowers Price Target to $134
summary: Truist Securities  analyst Gabe Daoud   maintains EOG Resources (NYSE:EOG) with a Hold and lowers the price target from $149 to $134.
